metadata.title: Beside — You care for your loved one. We help you cope.
metadata.description: Beside helps family caregivers track their loved one's health, organize appointments, and share the load with family.

hero.headline: YOU CARE FOR YOUR LOVED ONE. WE HELP YOU COPE.
hero.description: Beside centralizes medications, appointments, and alerts for caregivers juggling work, family, and a parent's health.
hero.imageCaption: Less stress, more peace of mind
hero.sideStat: Medication reminders managed on average per week

images.mainAlt: Smiling senior woman in her living room
images.sideAlt: Caregiver organizing medical follow-up on a laptop
images.portraitAlt: Professional woman, typical family caregiver profile

medications.title: Medication tracking
medications.description: Never miss a dose or a prescription renewal again.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.description: Shared family calendar for medical consultations.

family.title: Family network
family.description: Split tasks and avoid carrying everything alone.

article.title: HOW TO AVOID BURNOUT AS A FAMILY CAREGIVER
